name: 婆媳從對立到同盟
name_en: Mother-in-Law and Daughter-in-Law: From Rivals to Allies
description: 婆婆從嫌棄醜媳婦、想換成童黛，到發現讀心術為真後視女主為家族活祖宗，完成態度大反轉，提供強烈的爽感。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Her inner thoughts are real. Oh no. Mom, you can't get a divorce. This isn't a jinx. This is clearly the Rome family's living ancestor.
examples.context: 婆婆從嫌棄醜媳婦、想換成童黛，到發現讀心術為真後視女主為家族活祖宗，完成態度大反轉，提供強烈的爽感。
